root.name: All API Services
root.description: Root node containing all API services across all functional domains

cat_sub1.name: Sports & Recreation
cat_sub1.description: Services for sports events, scores, statistics, teams, and recreational activities.
cat_sub1.boundary: Includes live scores, sports news, team data, and recreational activity info. Excludes fitness tracking (Healthcare) and general entertainment media.
cat_sub1.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to follow sports, get game data, or find recreational activity information.

cat_sub10.name: Weather & Environment
cat_sub10.description: Services for weather forecasts, climate data, environmental conditions, and natural phenomena.
cat_sub10.boundary: Includes weather forecasts, air quality, climate models, and natural disaster alerts. Excludes geographical maps and general scientific research data.
cat_sub10.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to get weather, climate, or environmental condition data.

cat_sub11.name: Education & Learning
cat_sub11.description: Services for educational content, learning resources, academic information, and research.
cat_sub11.boundary: Includes online courses, educational videos, academic databases, tutoring, and scientific research tools. Excludes entertainment books and professional career training.
cat_sub11.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to access educational materials, learning tools, academic information, or scientific research data.

cat_sub12.name: Social Media & Communication
cat_sub12.description: Services for social networking, messaging, email, and online communication platforms.
cat_sub12.boundary: Includes social networks, chat apps, email services, and video conferencing. Excludes news consumption and business marketing automation.
cat_sub12.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to connect with people, communicate online, or use social networks.

cat_sub13.name: Employment & Careers
cat_sub13.description: Services for job searching, career development, professional networking, and HR tools.
cat_sub13.boundary: Includes job boards, resume builders, recruitment platforms, and professional networks. Excludes general business analytics and customer management.
cat_sub13.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to find jobs, develop a career, network professionally, or manage HR processes.

cat_sub14.name: Business & Analytics
cat_sub14.description: Services for business operations, marketing, sales, analytics, and customer management.
cat_sub14.boundary: Includes CRM, marketing automation, sales data, business intelligence, and customer analytics. Excludes financial trading and general technology tools.
cat_sub14.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to manage business operations, analyze customer/market data, or run marketing/sales campaigns.

cat_sub18.name: Gaming & Interactive
cat_sub18.description: Services for video games, gaming content, interactive entertainment, and esports.
cat_sub18.boundary: Includes game APIs, esports data, gaming platforms, and interactive media. Excludes general entertainment streaming and sports betting.
cat_sub18.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to play games, access gaming content, or get game-related information.

cat_sub2.name: Finance & Investing
cat_sub2.description: Services for banking, investments, stocks, cryptocurrency, and personal finance management.
cat_sub2.boundary: Includes stock trading, crypto exchanges, banking APIs, and personal budgeting tools. Excludes business accounting software and e-commerce payment processing.
cat_sub2.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to manage money, track investments, trade assets, or access financial services.

cat_sub20.name: Real Estate & Property
cat_sub20.description: Services for property listings, real estate data, housing markets, and property management.
cat_sub20.boundary: Includes property search, real estate valuations, rental listings, and housing data. Excludes general business analytics and financial services.
cat_sub20.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to find properties, get real estate information, or manage housing-related data.

cat_sub21.name: Development Tools
cat_sub21.description: Services for software development, programming tools, and technical resources.
cat_sub21.boundary: Includes developer tools, APIs, documentation, and code libraries. Excludes data storage, file sharing, and cloud infrastructure services.
cat_sub21.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to develop software, use programming tools, or access technical resources for development.

cat_sub22.name: Data & Infrastructure
cat_sub22.description: Services for data management, storage, sharing, and cloud infrastructure.
cat_sub22.boundary: Includes data storage, file sharing, cloud services, data transfer, and download services. Excludes software development tools and business analytics.
cat_sub22.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to store, share, transfer, or manage data and infrastructure resources.

cat_sub23.name: Events & Activities
cat_sub23.description: Services for events, schedules, bookings, tickets, and activity information.
cat_sub23.boundary: Includes event listings, schedules, ticketing, bookings, and activity data. Excludes travel booking, sports events, and entertainment streaming.
cat_sub23.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to find event information, check schedules, book tickets, or manage activities.

cat_sub3.name: Travel & Transportation
cat_sub3.description: Services for booking travel, finding flights, accommodations, and transport options.
cat_sub3.boundary: Includes flight/hotel booking, ride-sharing, public transit info, and travel planning. Excludes general maps for non-travel use and automotive repair services.
cat_sub3.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to plan, book, or get information for travel or transportation.

cat_sub4.name: Shopping & E-commerce
cat_sub4.description: Services for online retail, product searches, price comparisons, and purchases.
cat_sub4.boundary: Includes product listings, shopping carts, payment processing, and retail marketplaces. Excludes food delivery (Food & Dining) and B2B procurement platforms.
cat_sub4.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to find, compare, or buy products online.

cat_sub5.name: Entertainment & Media
cat_sub5.description: Services for consuming movies, music, videos, books, and entertainment content.
cat_sub5.boundary: Includes streaming media, entertainment news, book databases, celebrity info, and religious/spiritual content. Excludes interactive gaming and social media interaction.
cat_sub5.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to consume or discover entertainment, media, or faith-based content.

cat_sub6.name: Food & Dining
cat_sub6.description: Services for restaurants, recipes, food delivery, and dining recommendations.
cat_sub6.boundary: Includes restaurant reviews, meal delivery, recipe databases, and dining guides. Excludes grocery shopping (Shopping) and nutrition tracking (Healthcare).
cat_sub6.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to find food, order meals, get recipes, or choose dining options.

cat_sub7.name: Geography & Maps
cat_sub7.description: Services for maps, locations, geospatial data, and geographical information systems.
cat_sub7.boundary: Includes mapping, geocoding, routing, location-based services, and GIS data. Excludes weather data and travel booking interfaces.
cat_sub7.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to get maps, location coordinates, or geographical data for any application.

cat_sub8.name: Healthcare & Wellness
cat_sub8.description: Services for medical information, health tracking, wellness, and healthcare resources.
cat_sub8.boundary: Includes medical databases, symptom checkers, fitness trackers, and telemedicine. Excludes sports performance data and food nutrition APIs.
cat_sub8.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to access medical info, track health metrics, or find healthcare services.

cat_sub9.name: News & Information
cat_sub9.description: Services for news articles, current events, journalism, and factual reporting.
cat_sub9.boundary: Includes news aggregators, press releases, fact-checking, and event reporting. Excludes entertainment gossip, social media feeds, and educational content.
cat_sub9.decision_rule: Classify here if the primary purpose is to read news, follow current events, or get factual reports.

cat_sports_1.name: Football/Soccer Services
cat_sports_1.description: Services providing data for football/soccer matches, teams, players, leagues, and competitions.
cat_sports_1.boundary: Football/soccer-specific data services. Excludes rugby, American football, and general multi-sport aggregation.
cat_sports_1.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides football/soccer data (matches, standings, players, teams), classify here.

cat_sports_10.name: Winter & Water Sports Services
cat_sports_10.description: Services for skiing, snowboarding, surfing, diving, and other winter/water-based sports conditions and events.
cat_sports_10.boundary: Winter sports and water sports data services. Excludes land-based team sports and general multi-sport aggregation.
cat_sports_10.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides winter sports or water sports data (resort conditions, surf reports, events), classify here.

cat_sports_12.name: Player & Team Data Services
cat_sports_12.description: Services providing detailed player profiles, team rosters, athlete statistics, and performance/health data.
cat_sports_12.boundary: Focused on player/team entity and performance data. Excludes match/competition data and betting odds.
cat_sports_12.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides detailed data about individual players or teams (profiles, rosters, stats, performance), classify here.

cat_sports_13.name: Competition & League Data Services
cat_sports_13.description: Services providing tournament structures, league standings, cup trees, season schedules, and competition metadata.
cat_sports_13.boundary: Focused on competition/league structure data. Excludes player data, live scores, and general news aggregation.
cat_sports_13.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data about competition structures (tournaments, leagues, schedules, standings), classify here.

cat_sports_14.name: Live Match & Event Data Services
cat_sports_14.description: Services providing live match data, event details, real-time scores, and fan engagement metrics for specific events.
cat_sports_14.boundary: Focused on live event data and real-time metrics. Excludes historical statistics and competition structures.
cat_sports_14.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides live data for specific matches/events (scores, details, fan metrics), classify here.

cat_sports_15.name: Team & League Directory Services
cat_sports_15.description: Services providing team lists, league directories, organizational databases, and basic entity information.
cat_sports_15.boundary: Focused on organizational directories and basic entity data. Excludes detailed statistics and live event data.
cat_sports_15.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides directory data for teams or leagues (lists, databases, basic info), classify here.

cat_sports_16.name: Multi-Sport Aggregation Services
cat_sports_16.description: Services that aggregate live scores, schedules, results, and content analysis across multiple distinct sports.
cat_sports_16.boundary: Live multi-sport score/schedule/content aggregation. Excludes single-sport services and player data.
cat_sports_16.decision_rule: If the service primarily aggregates data or content across multiple different sports, classify here.

cat_sports_17.name: Sports Betting & Odds Services
cat_sports_17.description: Services providing sports betting odds, predictions, and gambling-related data.
cat_sports_17.boundary: Sports betting and gambling data services. Excludes pure sports statistics without betting focus.
cat_sports_17.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides betting odds, predictions, or gambling data for sports, classify here.

cat_sports_19.name: Outdoor & Recreational Services
cat_sports_19.description: Services for outdoor activities, adventure sports, recreational planning, and youth/fitness programs.
cat_sports_19.boundary: Outdoor recreational activity data and programs. Excludes competitive sports data and indoor fitness tracking.
cat_sports_19.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data for outdoor recreational activities (not competitive sports), classify here.

cat_sports_2.name: Basketball Services
cat_sports_2.description: Services for basketball games, statistics, teams, players, and league data including NBA and WNBA.
cat_sports_2.boundary: Basketball-specific data services. Excludes other ball sports and general multi-sport aggregation.
cat_sports_2.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides basketball data (games, stats, teams, players), classify here.

cat_sports_3.name: Baseball Services
cat_sports_3.description: Services offering baseball game data, player statistics, team information, and league standings.
cat_sports_3.boundary: Baseball-specific data services. Excludes cricket, softball, and general multi-sport aggregation.
cat_sports_3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides baseball data (games, stats, teams, players), classify here.

cat_sports_4.name: Ice Hockey Services
cat_sports_4.description: Services for ice hockey matches, team data, player statistics, and league information including NHL.
cat_sports_4.boundary: Ice hockey-specific data services. Excludes field hockey, roller hockey, and general multi-sport aggregation.
cat_sports_4.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides ice hockey data (matches, stats, teams, players), classify here.

cat_sports_5.name: American Football & Rugby Services
cat_sports_5.description: Services providing NFL, college football, and rugby data including games, teams, players, and statistics.
cat_sports_5.boundary: American football and rugby data services. Excludes soccer, Australian rules football, and general multi-sport aggregation.
cat_sports_5.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides American football or rugby data (games, teams, players, stats), classify here.

cat_sports_6.name: Individual Sports Services
cat_sports_6.description: Services for tennis, golf, athletics, cycling, and other individual sport competition data and rankings.
cat_sports_6.boundary: Individual sport data services (e.g., tennis, golf, athletics). Excludes team sports and general multi-sport aggregation.
cat_sports_6.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data for individual sports (tournaments, players, rankings, stats), classify here.

cat_sports_7.name: Cricket Services
cat_sports_7.description: Services offering cricket match data, player statistics, team information, and tournament details.
cat_sports_7.boundary: Cricket-specific data services. Excludes baseball, softball, and general multi-sport aggregation.
cat_sports_7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides cricket data (matches, stats, teams, tournaments), classify here.

cat_sports_8.name: Motorsports Services
cat_sports_8.description: Services for Formula 1, racing events, driver statistics, team data, and competition standings.
cat_sports_8.boundary: Motorsports-specific data services. Excludes other vehicle sports and general multi-sport aggregation.
cat_sports_8.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides motorsports data (races, drivers, teams, standings), classify here.

cat_sports_9.name: Martial Arts Services
cat_sports_9.description: Services for UFC, boxing, taekwondo, and other combat sports including fights, fighters, and rankings.
cat_sports_9.boundary: Martial arts and combat sport data services. Excludes other sports and general multi-sport aggregation.
cat_sports_9.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides martial arts data (fights, fighters, rankings, techniques), classify here.

cat_sub10_sub1.name: Atmospheric Weather
cat_sub10_sub1.description: Current conditions, forecasts, and historical data for temperature, precipitation, wind, and general atmospheric phenomena.
cat_sub10_sub1.boundary: Includes visual monitoring (webcams) and basic weather data. Excludes air quality, astronomical events, marine data, and activity-specific forecasts.
cat_sub10_sub1.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides current/forecasted atmospheric data or visual monitoring of weather conditions.

cat_sub10_sub10.name: Weather-Based Recommendations
cat_sub10_sub10.description: Suggesting activities, clothing, travel dates, or other recommendations based on weather conditions.
cat_sub10_sub10.boundary: Includes recommendations or suggestions driven primarily by weather. Excludes raw weather data and forecasts without recommendations.
cat_sub10_sub10.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides recommendations or suggestions based primarily on weather conditions.

cat_sub10_sub11.name: Solar & Renewable Energy Generation
cat_sub10_sub11.description: Assessing solar panel performance, shadow impact, renewable energy potential, and generation conditions.
cat_sub10_sub11.boundary: Includes solar conditions, renewable energy performance and generation assessments. Excludes general weather data and energy efficiency metrics.
cat_sub10_sub11.decision_rule: Classify here if the service assesses solar conditions, renewable energy potential, or generation performance.

cat_sub10_sub12.name: Utility & Energy Market Data
cat_sub10_sub12.description: Energy price tracking, grid load data, electricity market information, and utility-related geographic data.
cat_sub10_sub12.boundary: Includes energy market prices, grid conditions, and utility operational data. Excludes energy efficiency calculations and weather forecasts.
cat_sub10_sub12.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides energy market prices, grid load data, or utility operational information.

cat_sub10_sub2.name: Air Quality & Pollution
cat_sub10_sub2.description: Measuring and forecasting air pollution, particulate matter, and indoor/outdoor environmental quality conditions.
cat_sub10_sub2.boundary: Includes both outdoor air quality indices and indoor environmental measurements (IAQ). Excludes general weather data and pollution news/articles.
cat_sub10_sub2.decision_rule: Classify here if the service measures or forecasts air quality/pollution levels or indoor environmental conditions.

cat_sub10_sub3.name: Marine & Water Conditions
cat_sub10_sub3.description: Tide data, surf conditions, marine forecasts, water body conditions, and coastal environmental information.
cat_sub10_sub3.boundary: Includes marine weather, surf/tide reports, water temperature, and forecasts for water-based activities. Excludes general atmospheric weather.
cat_sub10_sub3.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides marine, coastal, or water body-specific conditions, forecasts, or data.

cat_sub10_sub4.name: Astronomical Events
cat_sub10_sub4.description: Tracking sunrise, sunset, moon phases, moon illumination, and other celestial events.
cat_sub10_sub4.boundary: Includes only celestial event data and related timing. Excludes weather forecasts, air quality, or terrestrial environmental measurements.
cat_sub10_sub4.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides data about sunrise, sunset, moon phases, or celestial events.

cat_sub10_sub5.name: Natural Hazards & Alerts
cat_sub10_sub5.description: Earthquake notifications, severe weather alerts, risk assessments, wildfire tracking, and natural hazard warnings.
cat_sub10_sub5.boundary: Includes real-time alerts, risk assessments, and tracking/monitoring for disasters. Excludes general forecasts and climate data.
cat_sub10_sub5.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides alerts, notifications, risk assessments, or tracking for natural hazards/disasters.

cat_sub10_sub6.name: Climate & Environmental Data
cat_sub10_sub6.description: Long-term climate predictions, trends, historical analysis, environmental health data, and climate change information.
cat_sub10_sub6.boundary: Includes climate models, trends, historical data, environmental statistics, and disease/environment correlations. Excludes short-term weather forecasts.
cat_sub10_sub6.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides long-term climate data, environmental trends, analysis, or health/environment statistics.

cat_sub10_sub7.name: Energy Efficiency & Impact
cat_sub10_sub7.description: Calculating heating/cooling degree days, energy efficiency, environmental impact assessments, and related metrics.
cat_sub10_sub7.boundary: Includes energy-related metrics derived from weather/climate for efficiency or impact analysis. Excludes raw weather data and renewable energy generation.
cat_sub10_sub7.decision_rule: Classify here if the service calculates energy-related metrics or environmental impact based on weather/climate data.

cat_sub10_sub8.name: Geographic & Location Data
cat_sub10_sub8.description: Elevation data, location searches, geographic coordinates conversion, place identification, and basic geospatial info.
cat_sub10_sub8.boundary: Includes only geographic/location data without environmental conditions. Excludes weather forecasts or environmental data at locations.
cat_sub10_sub8.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides geographic data, location searches, or elevation without environmental conditions.

cat_sub10_sub9.name: Specialized Activity Weather
cat_sub10_sub9.description: Weather forecasts optimized for specific activities like sailing, cycling, skiing, golf, hiking, or outdoor recreation.
cat_sub10_sub9.boundary: Includes activity-tailored forecasts, conditions, and safety recommendations (e.g., avalanche risk). Excludes general weather forecasts.
cat_sub10_sub9.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides weather conditions specifically optimized for activities, sports, or recreation.

cat_sub11_sub1.name: Language Learning
cat_sub11_sub1.description: Services for learning languages, translation, dictionaries, and linguistic analysis.
cat_sub11_sub1.boundary: Focus on language acquisition, translation, and word analysis. Excludes general reading materials and academic research.
cat_sub11_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily helps users learn, translate, or analyze languages or words, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub10.name: Test Preparation
cat_sub11_sub10.description: Services for exam preparation, practice questions, flashcards, and test-taking skills.
cat_sub11_sub10.boundary: Focus on assessment preparation and practice. Excludes general course content and academic research.
cat_sub11_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily helps users prepare for exams or tests with practice materials, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub11.name: Online Courses & Learning Platforms
cat_sub11_sub11.description: Services for managing online courses, enrollment, lesson plans, and educational multimedia content.
cat_sub11_sub11.boundary: Focus on course delivery platforms and educational content hosting. Excludes specific subject teaching and research tools.
cat_sub11_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages course enrollment, lesson plans, online learning platforms, or hosts educational multimedia, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub12.name: Educational Assessment
cat_sub11_sub12.description: Services for evaluating learning progress, creating assessments, and tracking educational outcomes.
cat_sub11_sub12.boundary: Focus on measuring and evaluating educational progress. Excludes teaching content and course management.
cat_sub11_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily assesses learning progress, creates evaluations, or tracks educational outcomes, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub13.name: Natural Sciences Education
cat_sub11_sub13.description: Services for learning astronomy, biology, earth sciences, and environmental studies.
cat_sub11_sub13.boundary: Focus on teaching natural science subjects. Excludes scientific research tools, laboratory simulations, and medical education.
cat_sub11_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily teaches astronomy, biology, earth sciences, or environmental studies, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub14.name: General Content Discovery
cat_sub11_sub14.description: Services for finding, classifying, or extracting educational content from various sources.
cat_sub11_sub14.boundary: Focus on content retrieval, classification, and extraction tools for educational purposes. Excludes subject-specific teaching and academic research databases.
cat_sub11_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily helps find, classify, or extract educational content (videos, articles, resources) from external sources, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub3.name: Science & Laboratory
cat_sub11_sub3.description: Services for scientific data analysis, laboratory simulations, and scientific research tools.
cat_sub11_sub3.boundary: Focus on scientific analysis, experimentation, and research tools. Excludes subject-specific educational content and academic papers.
cat_sub11_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes scientific data, simulates laboratory conditions, or provides scientific research capabilities, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub4.name: STEM Education
cat_sub11_sub4.description: Services for learning mathematics, computer science, engineering, and technology concepts.
cat_sub11_sub4.boundary: Focus on teaching STEM subjects including math, programming, engineering, and technology. Excludes scientific research tools and general science education.
cat_sub11_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily teaches mathematics, programming, engineering, or technology concepts, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub5.name: Literature & Reading
cat_sub11_sub5.description: Services for accessing books, authors, literary information, and reading materials.
cat_sub11_sub5.boundary: Focus on literary content, books, and reading resources. Excludes language learning tools and general educational videos.
cat_sub11_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides book information, author details, or literary resources, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub6.name: Arts, Culture & Humanities
cat_sub11_sub6.description: Services for learning about arts, cultural studies, creative disciplines, and social sciences.
cat_sub11_sub6.boundary: Focus on creative arts, cultural education, and human behavior studies. Excludes language learning and natural sciences.
cat_sub11_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily teaches artistic disciplines, cultural studies, psychology, or social sciences, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub7.name: Health & Physical Education
cat_sub11_sub7.description: Services for medical training, healthcare education, physical education, and fitness learning.
cat_sub11_sub7.boundary: Focus on medical knowledge, healthcare training, and physical activity education. Excludes general biology and non-medical sciences.
cat_sub11_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides medical education, healthcare training, or physical education resources, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub8.name: Specialized Skills Training
cat_sub11_sub8.description: Services for learning specific practical skills, how-to guides, and specialized techniques.
cat_sub11_sub8.boundary: Focus on practical, non-academic skill development. Excludes academic subjects, language learning, and general knowledge.
cat_sub11_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily teaches practical skills, how-to procedures, or specialized techniques, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub9.name: Educational Administration
cat_sub11_sub9.description: Services for school management, classroom administration, attendance tracking, and scheduling.
cat_sub11_sub9.boundary: Focus on educational institution management and logistics. Excludes actual learning content and student assessment.
cat_sub11_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles educational administration, school management, or classroom logistics, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub1.name: User Profile Management
cat_sub12_sub1.description: Services for retrieving, managing, and analyzing user profiles, identities, and basic account information across social platforms.
cat_sub12_sub1.boundary: Focuses on basic user identity and account data. Excludes analyzing user content, engagement metrics, or contact lists.
cat_sub12_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves or manages basic user identity, profile data, or account information, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub10.name: Forum & Community Management
cat_sub12_sub10.description: Services for analyzing posts, tracking engagement, and managing interactions within online forums and communities.
cat_sub12_sub10.boundary: Specifically for dedicated forum/community platforms. Excludes general social media post analysis or scheduling.
cat_sub12_sub10.decision_rule: If the service is specifically designed for analyzing or managing activity within online forums or community platforms, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub12.name: Cross-Platform Aggregation
cat_sub12_sub12.description: Services that aggregate or analyze data across multiple social platforms for a unified view or action.
cat_sub12_sub12.boundary: Core function must involve multiple different platforms. Excludes services that only operate on a single platform.
cat_sub12_sub12.decision_rule: If the service's core function is to aggregate data or perform an action across multiple different social/media platforms, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub14.name: Communication Analysis & Translation
cat_sub12_sub14.description: Services for analyzing communication styles, grammar, or translating into non-verbal languages like sign language.
cat_sub12_sub14.boundary: Focuses on the structure, style, or translation of communication itself. Excludes managing communication channels.
cat_sub12_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes communication styles/grammar or translates into non-verbal languages, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub2.name: Content Discovery & Search
cat_sub12_sub2.description: Services for searching, browsing, and discovering posts, media, hashtags, and trends across platforms.
cat_sub12_sub2.boundary: Focuses on finding public content via keywords, trends, or exploration. Excludes retrieving specific known content or analyzing performance.
cat_sub12_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for or discovers public content based on keywords, trends, or browsing, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub3.name: Content Retrieval & Details
cat_sub12_sub3.description: Services for fetching specific posts, videos, or media and their detailed metadata using a direct identifier (URL, ID).
cat_sub12_sub3.boundary: Focuses on retrieving known content via direct reference. Excludes searching for content or analyzing engagement.
cat_sub12_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves a specific piece of content and its metadata using a direct identifier, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub4.name: Comment & Interaction Management
cat_sub12_sub4.description: Services for fetching, posting, and managing comments, replies, and direct user interactions on content.
cat_sub12_sub4.boundary: Focuses on the lifecycle of comments and public replies. Excludes private messaging and sentiment analysis of comments.
cat_sub12_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles the retrieval, creation, or management of comments and replies on content, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub5.name: Content Operations
cat_sub12_sub5.description: Services for downloading, scheduling, publishing, and generating ideas/captions for social media content.
cat_sub12_sub5.boundary: Focuses on the practical workflow of content handling. Excludes content discovery, retrieval, and performance analysis.
cat_sub12_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily downloads, schedules, publishes, or generates creative elements for social content, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub6.name: Engagement & Activity Analysis
cat_sub12_sub6.description: Services that analyze engagement metrics, activity levels, reach, and performance of content or users.
cat_sub12_sub6.boundary: Focuses on quantitative metrics and performance analysis. Excludes retrieving raw content or qualitative sentiment analysis.
cat_sub12_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes metrics related to content engagement, user activity, or reach, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub7.name: Social Graph & Contact Discovery
cat_sub12_sub7.description: Services for managing a user's connections and discovering new influencers or contacts based on criteria.
cat_sub12_sub7.boundary: Focuses on relationship lists and discovery of new connections. Excludes analyzing the profile or content of discovered contacts.
cat_sub12_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages a user's connections or searches for/discoveries new influencers/contacts, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub8.name: Email Services
cat_sub12_sub8.description: Services for sending, managing, verifying, enriching, and securing email messages and addresses.
cat_sub12_sub8.boundary: Encompasses the full email lifecycle from sending to security. Excludes analyzing email content for non-security purposes.
cat_sub12_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles sending, managing, verifying, or securing email, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub9.name: Phone & SMS Services
cat_sub12_sub9.description: Services for sending SMS, making calls, and validating/managing phone numbers and telephony infrastructure.
cat_sub12_sub9.boundary: Focuses on telephony and SMS communication channels. Excludes analyzing message/call content or transcripts.

cat_sub14_sub15.name: Compliance & Risk Management
cat_sub14_sub15.description: Services that check regulatory compliance, audit data privacy, monitor fraud, and assess business risks.
cat_sub14_sub15.boundary: Focuses on regulatory adherence, risk assessment, fraud detection, and compliance monitoring. Does not include general operational analytics or financial auditing.

cat_sub14_sub16.name: Location & Geographic Analytics

cat_sub14_sub16.boundary: Focuses on spatial analysis, location tracking, and geographic intelligence for business decisions. Does not include general business intelligence or operational analytics.

cat_sub14_sub17.name: Media & Content Analytics
cat_sub14_sub17.description: Services that analyze media performance, track content engagement, measure reach, and optimize content strategy.
cat_sub14_sub17.boundary: Focuses on measuring and optimizing the performance of published content and media assets. Does not include brand monitoring or SEO-specific analytics.
cat_sub14_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes media performance, tracks content engagement, or measures media reach, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub18.name: Operational Analytics
cat_sub14_sub18.description: Services that analyze business operations, track efficiency metrics, optimize processes, and monitor operational performance.
cat_sub14_sub18.boundary: Focuses on internal process efficiency, operational metrics, and workflow optimization. Does not include product/inventory management, sales transactions, or customer analytics.

cat_sub14_sub2.boundary: Focuses on historical and current financial performance data from official statements and derived metrics. Does not include market trading data or investment valuation models.

cat_sub14_sub3.description: Services that deliver market prices, trading volumes, stock performance metrics, and technical analysis indicators for securities and commodities.
cat_sub14_sub3.boundary: Focuses on real-time and historical market trading data, price feeds, and trading-specific analytics. Does not include broader market research or consumer sentiment.
cat_sub14_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides market prices, trading volumes, stock charts, or technical analysis indicators, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub4.name: Customer Analytics & Relationship Management
cat_sub14_sub4.description: Services that analyze customer behavior, segment customers, manage customer data, and support customer lifecycle interactions.
cat_sub14_sub4.boundary: Focuses on understanding customers through analytics and managing ongoing customer relationships and data. Does not include lead generation or marketing campaign execution.

cat_sub14_sub5.name: Marketing Campaign Management

cat_sub14_sub5.boundary: Focuses on the execution, management, and performance tracking of marketing campaigns and communications. Does not include SEO, brand monitoring, or lead generation.

cat_sub14_sub7.boundary: Focuses on external perception, mentions, and sentiment analysis related to brands and reputation. Does not include media performance analytics for non-brand content.

cat_sub14_sub9.name: Product & Inventory Management

cat_fin_loans_credit.name: Loans & Credit

cat_fin_market_screeners.name: Market Screeners & Discovery

cat_fin_news_sentiment.name: Financial News & Sentiment

cat_fin_prediction_signals.name: Predictions & Trading Signals

cat_sub3_sub15.boundary: Travel industry data and analytics. Excludes booking services.

cat_sub3_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily converts travel identifiers or codes, classify here.

cat_sub3_sub2.name: Accommodation Services
cat_sub3_sub2.description: Services for searching, booking, and managing hotels, vacation rentals, and other lodging options.
cat_sub3_sub2.boundary: All lodging types. Excludes transportation or attraction bookings.

cat_sub3_sub3.name: Ground Transportation

cat_sub3_sub3.boundary: Road-based personal transport. Excludes public transit and flights.

cat_sub3_sub4.name: Public Transit

cat_sub3_sub4.boundary: Scheduled public transport networks. Excludes taxis and ride-sharing.

cat_sub3_sub5.name: Airport & Aviation Data
cat_sub3_sub5.description: Services providing airport information, aviation statistics, aircraft data, and airport operations.

cat_sub3_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides airport, aircraft, or aviation data without booking, classify here.

cat_sub3_sub6.name: Travel Planning & Itineraries
cat_sub3_sub6.description: Services for creating trip plans, generating itineraries, and suggesting travel activities.

cat_sub3_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates travel plans or suggests activities, classify here.

cat_sub3_sub9.boundary: Water-based travel and transport. Excludes standard hotel/flight bookings.
cat_sub3_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles cruise ships, ferries, or maritime transport, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub1.name: Product Discovery & Search
cat_sub4_sub1.description: Services for finding, searching, browsing, and comparing products across platforms.
cat_sub4_sub1.boundary: Includes product searches, filtered browsing, and side-by-side product comparisons. Excludes fetching detailed specs for a single product or checking real-time availability.
cat_sub4_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily helps users find, list, or compare products based on queries, filters, or categories, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub10.name: Store & Location Finder
cat_sub4_sub10.description: Services that find physical retail stores or pickup locations.
cat_sub4_sub10.boundary: Includes finding brick-and-mortar store locations. Excludes online marketplace searches and checking inventory at found stores.
cat_sub4_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily finds physical store locations, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub11.name: Product Categorization & Taxonomy
cat_sub4_sub11.description: Services that organize products into categories or classify products.
cat_sub4_sub11.boundary: Includes defining, listing, or assigning product categories. Excludes searching within categories and fetching product details.
cat_sub4_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily defines, lists, or assigns product categories, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub12.name: Personalized Recommendations
cat_sub4_sub12.description: Services that suggest products based on user preferences or history.
cat_sub4_sub12.boundary: Includes tailored suggestions to a user. Excludes general product searches and fetching product details without recommendation logic.
cat_sub4_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides tailored product suggestions to a user, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub13.name: Market & Platform Metadata
cat_sub4_sub13.description: Services that provide supporting data about shopping platforms.
cat_sub4_sub13.boundary: Includes metadata about the shopping ecosystem (countries, brands, sites). Excludes operations on products, orders, or users within those markets.
cat_sub4_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves metadata about the shopping ecosystem, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub15.name: Product & Store Management
cat_sub4_sub15.description: Services for merchants to manage product listings, storefronts, or catalogs.
cat_sub4_sub15.boundary: Includes adding, updating, or managing products in a seller's catalog or store. Excludes customer-facing product discovery and order placement.

cat_sub4_sub2.name: Product Information & Details
cat_sub4_sub2.description: Services that retrieve detailed specifications, descriptions, and data for a specific product.
cat_sub4_sub2.boundary: Includes comprehensive details for a single, identified product. Excludes searching for products, comparing multiple products, and checking prices/availability.
cat_sub4_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily fetches comprehensive details for a single, identified product, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub3.name: Price & Offer Tracking
cat_sub4_sub3.description: Services focused on retrieving current prices, historical price data, and available offers.
cat_sub4_sub3.boundary: Includes pricing information, discounts, and price history. Excludes general product details without price focus, and purchasing/checkout services.
cat_sub4_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides pricing information, discounts, or tracks price history, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub4.name: Product Reviews & Feedback
cat_sub4_sub4.description: Services that fetch customer reviews, ratings, and feedback for products or businesses.
cat_sub4_sub4.boundary: Includes user-generated reviews, ratings, or feedback. Excludes product specifications, price data, and business information without a review focus.
cat_sub4_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves user-generated reviews, ratings, or feedback, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub5.name: Inventory & Availability Check
cat_sub4_sub5.description: Services that check real-time stock levels or product availability.
cat_sub4_sub5.boundary: Includes checking if a product is in stock or available for purchase at specific locations. Excludes general product searches and price checks.
cat_sub4_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily checks if a product is in stock or available for purchase, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub6.name: Shopping Cart & Order Calculation
cat_sub4_sub6.description: Services for managing shopping cart items and calculating total order costs.
cat_sub4_sub6.boundary: Includes adding/removing cart items and computing the total monetary sum of a prospective order (items, taxes, fees). Excludes product search and the final checkout/payment process.
cat_sub4_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles cart items or computes the total cost of a prospective order, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub7.name: Order Placement & Purchase
cat_sub4_sub7.description: Services that execute the final step of purchasing a product or placing an order.
cat_sub4_sub7.boundary: Includes completing a transaction to buy a product. Excludes cart management, price calculation, and post-purchase tracking.
cat_sub4_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily completes a transaction to buy a product, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub8.name: Order, Transaction & Analytics

cat_sub4_sub8.boundary: Includes fetching details of completed orders and analyzing shopping data for trends. Excludes placing new orders and tracking delivery.
cat_sub4_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily fetches order details/history or analyzes shopping data to identify trends, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub9.name: Shipping, Delivery & Tracking
