cat_sub7_sub2.name: Routing, Directions & Distance
cat_sub7_sub2.description: Services that calculate routes, travel paths, navigation steps, or distances between locations.
cat_sub7_sub2.boundary: Point-to-point and multi-point routing, directions, and distance calculations (including simple coordinate-based distance).
cat_sub7_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily calculates a travel path, provides navigation instructions, or calculates the distance/duration between points, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub3.name: Point of Interest (POI) & Venue Search
cat_sub7_sub3.description: Services that find specific venues, facilities, businesses, or visual feeds (e.g., webcams) by location or attributes.
cat_sub7_sub3.boundary: Search for businesses, airports, stations, attractions, and geographically-tagged visual feeds like webcams.
cat_sub7_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for specific venue locations or geographically-tagged visual feeds, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub4.name: Administrative Boundaries
cat_sub7_sub4.description: Services that provide data about political or administrative regions and their geographic borders.
cat_sub7_sub4.boundary: Information or geometries for countries, states, cities, counties, or postal code boundaries.
cat_sub7_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides information or geometries for administrative boundaries, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub5.name: Spatial Search & Proximity
cat_sub7_sub5.description: Services that find all points or areas within a specified radius or bounding box of a given location.
cat_sub7_sub5.boundary: Finding items (postcodes, counties, venues) within a radius or bounding box.
cat_sub7_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily finds all items within a radius or bounding box of a location, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub6.name: Spatial Analysis, Matrices & Terrain
cat_sub7_sub6.description: Services that perform multi-point spatial calculations, optimization, or provide elevation/terrain data.
cat_sub7_sub6.boundary: Distance/duration matrices, route optimization, multi-point analysis, and elevation/terrain data.
cat_sub7_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily performs advanced multi-point spatial analysis or provides elevation/terrain data, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub7.name: Country & Continent Data
cat_sub7_sub7.description: Services that provide reference information about countries, continents, capitals, and country codes.
cat_sub7_sub7.boundary: Data about countries or continents (details, codes, capitals, lists).
cat_sub7_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data about countries or continents, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub8.name: City & Locality Data
cat_sub7_sub8.description: Services that provide reference information about cities, towns, populations, and city lists within regions.
cat_sub7_sub8.boundary: Data about cities (lists, populations, details within a country/state).
cat_sub7_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data about cities, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub9.name: Postal Code & ZIP Code Data
cat_sub7_sub9.description: Services that provide information, validation, or geolocation for postal codes and similar mailing codes.
cat_sub7_sub9.boundary: Lookup or validation of data for a specific postal/ZIP code.
cat_sub7_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily looks up or validates data for a postal code, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub1.name: Medical Diagnosis & Symptom Analysis
cat_sub8_sub1.description: Services that analyze symptoms, suggest diagnoses, or assess disease risk based on medical inputs.
cat_sub8_sub1.boundary: Focuses on analyzing health inputs to suggest conditions or assess risk. Excludes retrieving records, scheduling, or managing treatments.
cat_sub8_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes health inputs to suggest conditions or assess risk, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub10.name: Mental & Behavioral Health
cat_sub8_sub10.description: Services for assessing, tracking, or supporting mental wellness, psychiatric conditions, and stress management.
cat_sub8_sub10.boundary: Focuses on mental/psychological state assessment, tracking, or support programs. Excludes physical diagnosis, fitness, or relationship counseling.
cat_sub8_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily assesses, tracks, or provides programs for mental/psychological state, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub11.name: Epidemiology & Population Health
cat_sub8_sub11.description: Services that retrieve and calculate statistics for diseases, outbreaks, and infection rates for populations.
cat_sub8_sub11.boundary: Focuses on statistical data on disease spread in populations. Excludes personal risk assessment, individual diagnosis, or vaccination tracking.
cat_sub8_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily fetches or calculates statistical data on disease spread in populations, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub12.name: Clinical Research & Medical Knowledge
cat_sub8_sub12.description: Services for discovering clinical trials, biomedical patents, medical studies, and general medical information.
cat_sub8_sub12.boundary: Focuses on retrieving information about medical research, trials, patents, or educational content. Excludes personal care, diagnosis, or treatment plans.
cat_sub8_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves information about medical research, trials, patents, or reference content, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub13.name: Personalized Health Assessment
cat_sub8_sub13.description: Services that assess individual risk for diseases or analyze personal health data for insights.
cat_sub8_sub13.boundary: Focuses on calculating personalized risk scores or analyzing personal health data. Excludes diagnosing active conditions or population statistics.
cat_sub8_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily calculates a personalized risk score or analyzes personal health data for insights, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub14.name: Wellness & Lifestyle Management
cat_sub8_sub14.description: Services for creating or tracking personalized wellness, stress reduction, skincare, or preventive care routines.
cat_sub8_sub14.boundary: Focuses on holistic wellness, lifestyle, or preventive care programs. Excludes medical diagnosis, clinical treatments, or specific fitness workouts.
cat_sub8_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates or manages a holistic wellness, lifestyle, or preventive care program, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub15.name: Healthcare Operations & Administration
cat_sub8_sub15.description: Services for scheduling procedures, validating insurance, checking compliance, or managing healthcare logistics.
cat_sub8_sub15.boundary: Focuses on administrative, regulatory, insurance, or procedural aspects of healthcare. Excludes direct patient care, diagnosis, or personal health tracking.
cat_sub8_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles administrative, regulatory, insurance, or procedural healthcare logistics, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub16.name: Specialized Health Tools
cat_sub8_sub16.description: Services providing analysis or tools for specific niches like dental health, vision, toxicity, or reproductive health.
cat_sub8_sub16.boundary: Focuses on specialized tools for narrow health niches not covered by other categories. Excludes general diagnosis, broad wellness, or population statistics.
cat_sub8_sub16.decision_rule: If the service is a specialized tool for a narrow health niche not covered by other categories, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub17.name: Health Monitoring & Remote Care
cat_sub8_sub17.description: Services for real-time monitoring of patient health data and enabling remote/virtual care delivery.
cat_sub8_sub17.boundary: Focuses on real-time monitoring of vitals or facilitating remote care delivery. Excludes analyzing data for diagnosis, scheduling, or retrieving historical records.
cat_sub8_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables real-time monitoring of patient vitals or facilitates remote care delivery, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub2.name: Medical Records & Health Data
cat_sub8_sub2.description: Services for storing, retrieving, or querying personal health records and historical health data.
cat_sub8_sub2.boundary: Focuses on storing or fetching a user's recorded health information. Excludes analyzing data for diagnosis, scheduling care, or calculating metrics.
cat_sub8_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily stores or fetches a user's recorded health information, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub3.name: Appointment & Consultation Scheduling
cat_sub8_sub3.description: Services for booking, managing, or querying medical appointments and consultations.
cat_sub8_sub3.boundary: Focuses on scheduling or managing the booking of healthcare consultations. Excludes finding providers, diagnosing conditions, or managing health data.
cat_sub8_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily schedules or manages the booking of healthcare consultations, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub4.name: Healthcare Provider & Facility Search
cat_sub8_sub4.description: Services for locating and finding information about doctors, hospitals, pharmacies, or other medical facilities.
cat_sub8_sub4.boundary: Focuses on searching for or listing healthcare providers or facilities. Excludes booking appointments, ordering from pharmacies, or checking compliance.
cat_sub8_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for or lists healthcare providers or facilities, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub5.name: Treatment & Care Management
cat_sub8_sub5.description: Services that provide treatment plans, generate care plans, or manage therapy and counseling sessions.
cat_sub8_sub5.boundary: Focuses on defining or managing a course of treatment or therapeutic care. Excludes initial diagnosis, finding providers, or scheduling general appointments.
cat_sub8_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily defines or manages a course of treatment or therapeutic care, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub6.name: Medication & Pharmacy Management
cat_sub8_sub6.description: Services for ordering, reserving, managing schedules, or getting information about medications and pharmacy services.
cat_sub8_sub6.boundary: Focuses on handling drugs/medicines ordering, reservation, scheduling, or information. Excludes locating pharmacies, diagnosing conditions, or managing general appointments.
cat_sub8_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles the ordering, reservation, scheduling, or specific info of drugs/medicines, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub7.name: Nutrition & Food Analysis
cat_sub8_sub7.description: Services for calculating nutritional intake, planning meals, recommending diets, or analyzing food properties.
cat_sub8_sub7.boundary: Focuses on meal planning, nutrition tracking, diet recommendations, or food analysis. Excludes tracking general fitness, diagnosing conditions, or calculating disease statistics.
cat_sub8_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily plans meals, tracks nutrition, recommends diets, or analyzes food properties, classify here.

cat_sub8_sub8.name: Fitness & Exercise Tracking
cat_sub8_sub8.description: Services for planning workouts, tracking physical activity, or calculating exercise-related metrics like calories burned.
cat_sub8_sub8.boundary: Focuses on planning, recording, or analyzing physical exercise or athletic activity. Excludes planning diets, diagnosing medical conditions, or managing medical appointments.
cat_sub8_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily plans, records, or analyzes physical exercise or athletic activity, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub1.name: General & Breaking News
cat_sub9_sub1.description: Services providing broad news coverage, headlines, and current events including emergencies and crises.
cat_sub9_sub1.boundary: Covers general news, breaking news, and crisis/emergency events. Excludes topic-specific news filtering or aggregation.
cat_sub9_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides general news headlines, breaking news, or coverage of emergencies/crises, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub10.name: News Source & Media Analysis
cat_sub9_sub10.description: Services analyzing news sources, media statistics, credibility, and author information.
cat_sub9_sub10.boundary: Covers source analysis, media statistics, credibility assessment, and author profiles. Excludes actual news content publishing.
cat_sub9_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes news sources, media statistics, source credibility, or author information, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub11.name: Trending & Popular Topics
cat_sub9_sub11.description: Services identifying trending news, viral content, popular searches, and achievements.
cat_sub9_sub11.boundary: Covers trending topics, viral content, popular searches, and notable achievements/records. Excludes specific article filtering.
cat_sub9_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily identifies trending topics, viral content, popular searches, or notable achievements, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub12.name: News Search & Discovery
cat_sub9_sub12.description: Services enabling search across news articles, filtering by keywords, and discovery.
cat_sub9_sub12.boundary: Covers news search, filtering, and discovery functions. Excludes topic-specific news from single sources.
cat_sub9_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables searching, filtering, or discovering news articles, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub13.name: News Publishing & Distribution
cat_sub9_sub13.description: Services for publishing, distributing, or delivering news content in any format.
cat_sub9_sub13.boundary: Covers news publishing platforms, content extraction, distribution, multimedia delivery, and live feeds. Excludes consumption/analysis services.
cat_sub9_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables publishing, extracting, distributing, or delivering news content (including live feeds), classify here.

cat_sub9_sub14.name: Content Classification & Analysis
cat_sub9_sub14.description: Services that classify, categorize, or analyze news content and media.
cat_sub9_sub14.boundary: Covers content classification, categorization, and media analysis. Excludes source credibility analysis.
cat_sub9_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily classifies, categorizes, or analyzes news content/media, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub17.name: News Aggregation by Category
cat_sub9_sub17.description: Services that fetch or aggregate news articles organized by predefined categories.
cat_sub9_sub17.boundary: Covers news aggregation services that organize content by topic categories. Excludes general search or discovery without category structure.
cat_sub9_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily fetches or aggregates news articles organized by predefined categories, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub18.name: Demographic & Statistical Data
cat_sub9_sub18.description: Services providing population, demographic, or statistical information.
cat_sub9_sub18.boundary: Covers population data, demographic statistics, and related information services. Excludes news content or analysis.
cat_sub9_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides population, demographic, or statistical information, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub19.name: Video Content Services
cat_sub9_sub19.description: Services providing access to or information about video content from platforms.
cat_sub9_sub19.boundary: Covers video content access, information, and platform-specific services. Excludes live news feeds or webcams.
cat_sub9_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides access to or information about video content from platforms, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub2.name: Business & Finance News
cat_sub9_sub2.description: Services covering markets, companies, investments, and economic indicators.
cat_sub9_sub2.boundary: Includes stock markets, corporate news, investments, and economic data/indicators. Excludes cryptocurrency-specific news.
cat_sub9_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides news about business, finance, stocks, companies, or economic indicators, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub3.name: Technology & Science News
cat_sub9_sub3.description: Services covering tech developments, scientific research, AI, innovation, and cybersecurity.
cat_sub9_sub3.boundary: Includes general technology, scientific discoveries, artificial intelligence, and cybersecurity news. Excludes general business tech coverage.
cat_sub9_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides news about technology, science, research, artificial intelligence, or cybersecurity, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub4.name: Health & Medical News
cat_sub9_sub4.description: Services covering healthcare, medical research, disease outbreaks, and public health.
cat_sub9_sub4.boundary: Covers medicine, healthcare, diseases, and public health. Excludes environmental health topics.
cat_sub9_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides news about healthcare, medicine, or disease outbreaks, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub5.name: Sports & Entertainment News
cat_sub9_sub5.description: Services covering athletic events, sports teams, entertainment industry, and celebrities.
cat_sub9_sub5.boundary: Covers all sports-related news and entertainment industry coverage. Excludes political or business aspects of sports/entertainment.
cat_sub9_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides news about sports, athletic events, entertainment, or celebrities, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub7.name: Environmental & Climate News
cat_sub9_sub7.description: Services covering environmental issues, climate change, pollution, and conservation.
cat_sub9_sub7.boundary: Covers environment, climate, pollution, and conservation. Excludes general science news.
cat_sub9_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides news about environment, climate change, or conservation, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub8.name: Cryptocurrency & Blockchain News
cat_sub9_sub8.description: Services covering digital currencies, blockchain technology, and crypto markets.
cat_sub9_sub8.boundary: Covers cryptocurrencies, blockchain, and digital assets. Excludes general financial technology.
cat_sub9_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides news about cryptocurrencies, blockchain, or digital assets, classify here.

cat_sub9_sub9.name: Regional & Local News
cat_sub9_sub9.description: Services providing news specific to geographic regions, countries, or local areas.
cat_sub9_sub9.boundary: Covers news filtered by geographic region or locality. Excludes topic-specific regional coverage.
cat_sub9_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides news filtered by geographic region or locality, classify here.

cat_sports_13_sub1.name: Competition Structure & Metadata
cat_sports_13_sub1.description: Services retrieving competition structure, seasons, stages, brackets, and venue information.
cat_sports_13_sub1.boundary: Includes competition names, IDs, seasons, phases, stage metadata, bracket trees, knockout structures, and venue/location data. Excludes team lists, standings, schedules, and match-specific data.
cat_sports_13_sub1.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily retrieves structural, descriptive, or venue data about a competition/league/tournament as a whole entity.

cat_sports_13_sub10.name: Match & Player Statistics & Analytics
cat_sports_13_sub10.description: Services providing detailed match/player statistics, form guides, trends, or predictive analytics.
cat_sports_13_sub10.boundary: Includes detailed event-level statistics, scorecards, performance metrics, form guides, head-to-head trends, and pre/post-match predictions. Excludes aggregate standings, schedules, and basic competition metadata.
cat_sports_13_sub10.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily retrieves detailed statistics or analytical insights for matches or player performances.

cat_sports_13_sub2.name: Standings & Rankings
cat_sports_13_sub2.description: Services that fetch league tables, conference rankings, points totals, and team positional order.
cat_sports_13_sub2.boundary: Includes ordered rankings, tables, and points within a competition. Excludes team participation lists, match results, and competition metadata.
cat_sports_13_sub2.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily retrieves the ordered ranking or table position of teams within a competition.

cat_sports_13_sub3.name: Team & Participant Lists
cat_sports_13_sub3.description: Services retrieving lists of clubs, teams, or entries in a competition, including historical participation.
cat_sports_13_sub3.boundary: Includes current team rosters for a competition and historical lists of competitions an entity participated in. Excludes rankings, schedules, and detailed competition data.
cat_sports_13_sub3.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily retrieves a list of participating teams/entities for a competition OR a historical list of competitions associated with a team/player.

cat_sports_13_sub4.name: Match & Event Schedules
cat_sports_13_sub4.description: Services fetching the calendar of fixtures, matches, or events for a competition.
cat_sports_13_sub4.boundary: Includes dates, times, match pairings, and event timelines. Excludes live scores, results, pre-match analytics, and venue details.
cat_sports_13_sub4.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily retrieves the scheduled timeline of matches/events within a competition.

cat_sports_13_sub8.name: Competition Search & Discovery
cat_sports_13_sub8.description: Services enabling search, filtering, or listing of competitions based on criteria.
cat_sports_13_sub8.boundary: Includes finding competitions by sport, region, or other attributes, including lists with basic tournament info. Excludes detailed structural metadata for a single known competition.
cat_sports_13_sub8.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily enables discovering or listing competitions across multiple entities based on search/filter criteria.

cat_sub10_sub1_sub1.name: Current Conditions
cat_sub10_sub1_sub1.description: Services providing real-time or near-real-time atmospheric data for a specific location.
cat_sub10_sub1_sub1.boundary: Present moment or very recent timestamp data only. Excludes forecasts, historical data, or aggregated summaries.
cat_sub10_sub1_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides the weather conditions for the present moment or a very recent timestamp, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub1_sub10.name: Specific Parameter Data
cat_sub10_sub1_sub10.description: Services focused exclusively on providing data for specific weather parameters.
cat_sub10_sub1_sub10.boundary: Data focused on single parameters like precipitation or temperature. Excludes general multi-parameter services.
cat_sub10_sub1_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data focused exclusively on one specific weather parameter, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub1_sub12.name: General Weather Data
cat_sub10_sub1_sub12.description: Services providing basic weather data for locations without specifying timeframe or data type.
cat_sub10_sub1_sub12.boundary: Basic location-based weather queries that don't specify current, forecast, or historical focus. Excludes specialized services.
cat_sub10_sub1_sub12.decision_rule: If the service provides basic weather data for a location without clearly specifying the timeframe or data type, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub1_sub2.name: Short-Term Forecast
cat_sub10_sub1_sub2.description: Services providing weather predictions for the immediate future, typically hourly to ~10 days ahead.
cat_sub10_sub1_sub2.boundary: Predictions up to approximately 10 days. Excludes current conditions, long-term forecasts, and historical data.
cat_sub10_sub1_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides weather predictions for a timeframe from the next few hours up to approximately 10 days, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub1_sub3.name: Long-Term & Climate Forecasts
cat_sub10_sub1_sub3.description: Services providing weather predictions for extended periods or climate-scale outlooks.
cat_sub10_sub1_sub3.boundary: Predictions exceeding ~10 days, seasonal outlooks, or climate projections. Excludes short-term forecasts and historical normals.
cat_sub10_sub1_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides weather predictions for a timeframe exceeding approximately 10 days, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub1_sub4.name: Historical Weather Data
cat_sub10_sub1_sub4.description: Services providing recorded weather data for specific past dates or periods.
cat_sub10_sub1_sub4.boundary: Data for specific past dates. Excludes current conditions, forecasts, and statistical normals/averages.
cat_sub10_sub1_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides recorded weather data for a specific date or period in the past, classify here.

cat_sub10_sub1_sub8.name: Ski & Mountain Weather
cat_sub10_sub1_sub8.description: Services providing weather data or forecasts tailored for ski resorts or mountainous regions.
cat_sub10_sub1_sub8.boundary: Weather data specifically for ski resorts or mountainous terrain. Excludes general forecasts for non-mountainous areas.
cat_sub10_sub1_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides weather data or forecasts specifically for ski resorts or mountainous terrain, classify here.

cat_fin_crypto_sub1.name: Cryptocurrency Prices
cat_fin_crypto_sub1.description: Services retrieving current, historical, or comparative pricing data for cryptocurrencies and tokens.
cat_fin_crypto_sub1.boundary: Includes price, OHLC, and value data. Excludes market-wide metrics, exchange rates, and NFT-specific prices.
cat_fin_crypto_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily fetches the price, OHLC, or value of a cryptocurrency/token, classify here.

cat_fin_crypto_sub10.name: NFT Marketplace Activity
cat_fin_crypto_sub10.description: Services retrieving data about marketplace events, offers, loans, bids, or sales related to NFTs.
cat_fin_crypto_sub10.boundary: Includes marketplace dynamics like offers, bids, sales, and listing events for NFTs. Excludes collection stats and individual NFT ownership.
cat_fin_crypto_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily fetches marketplace events or dynamics for NFTs, classify here.

cat_fin_crypto_sub14.name: Project & Protocol Information
cat_fin_crypto_sub14.description: Services retrieving descriptive information, profiles, lists, or search results for crypto projects.
cat_fin_crypto_sub14.boundary: Includes project metadata, profiles, scam-check info, and search/discovery functions. Excludes real-time market data.
cat_fin_crypto_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily fetches descriptive metadata or search results for projects/protocols, classify here.

cat_fin_crypto_sub2.name: Market Data & Metrics
cat_fin_crypto_sub2.description: Services providing aggregated market statistics, trends, rankings, and exchange/listings data.
cat_fin_crypto_sub2.boundary: Includes market trends, gainers/losers, volume, capitalization, and exchange/market listings. Excludes raw price feeds and on-chain data.
cat_fin_crypto_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily fetches market-wide analytics, rankings, or lists of exchanges/markets, classify here.

cat_fin_crypto_sub3.name: Blockchain & On-Chain Data
cat_fin_crypto_sub3.description: Services retrieving data intrinsic to blockchain operation: blocks, transactions, addresses, and gas fees.
cat_fin_crypto_sub3.boundary: Includes blocks, transactions, network state, and transaction fees. Excludes token balances, market data, and DeFi metrics.
cat_fin_crypto_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily fetches data about blocks, transactions, or network state, classify here.

cat_fin_crypto_sub4.name: Token & Wallet Balances
cat_fin_crypto_sub4.description: Services querying cryptocurrency/token holdings for wallet addresses or performing basic wallet operations.
cat_fin_crypto_sub4.boundary: Includes token balances and basic read/write operations on addresses (e.g., forwarding). Excludes NFT holdings and complex DeFi interactions.
cat_fin_crypto_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily fetches token balances or performs basic operations on a wallet/address, classify here.

cat_fin_crypto_sub5.name: NFT Collections & Assets
cat_fin_crypto_sub5.description: Services retrieving data about NFT collections, their statistics, or specific owned NFT assets.
cat_fin_crypto_sub5.boundary: Includes collection stats (floor price), rankings, and lists of NFTs owned by an address. Excludes marketplace events and token balances.
cat_fin_crypto_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily fetches data about NFT collections or specific NFT assets, classify here.

cat_fin_crypto_sub6.name: Decentralized Exchange (DEX) Data
cat_fin_crypto_sub6.description: Services retrieving data specific to decentralized exchanges, like trading pairs and liquidity pools.
cat_fin_crypto_sub6.boundary: Includes DEX trading pairs, pool information, and liquidity metrics. Excludes centralized exchange data and simple token prices.
cat_fin_crypto_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily fetches data about DEX-specific entities like liquidity pairs, classify here.

cat_fin_crypto_sub7.name: News & Social Data
cat_fin_crypto_sub7.description: Services fetching news articles, social media data, or sentiment analysis for cryptocurrencies.
cat_fin_crypto_sub7.boundary: Includes news articles, headlines, social media feeds, and sentiment analysis. Excludes market analysis opinions and on-chain metrics.
cat_fin_crypto_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves news, social media data, or sentiment analysis for crypto, classify here.

cat_fin_crypto_sub8.name: Exchange Rate Calculation
cat_fin_crypto_sub8.description: Services calculating conversion rates or estimated prices between different currencies (crypto/fiat/crypto).
cat_fin_crypto_sub8.boundary: Includes rate calculations for currency conversions and price estimations. Excludes fetching standalone asset prices.
cat_fin_crypto_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily calculates a rate or estimated price for converting one currency to another, classify here.

cat_fin_forex_sub1.name: Real-time Rate Queries
cat_fin_forex_sub1.description: Services that provide current/latest exchange rates for currency pairs. Focuses on immediate market pricing without historical context.
cat_fin_forex_sub1.boundary: Does not include historical data, conversion calculations, or rate fluctuations over time.
cat_fin_forex_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides the most recent exchange rate for currency pairs, classify here.

cat_fin_forex_sub2.name: Historical Rate Data
cat_fin_forex_sub2.description: Services that retrieve exchange rates for specific past dates or date ranges. Includes OHLC data and time series endpoints.
cat_fin_forex_sub2.boundary: Does not include current/latest rates, currency conversion calculations, or rate change analysis.
cat_fin_forex_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides exchange rates for past dates or historical time periods, classify here.

cat_fin_forex_sub3.name: Currency Conversion
cat_fin_forex_sub3.description: Services that calculate converted amounts between currencies using exchange rates. Performs mathematical conversion operations.
cat_fin_forex_sub3.boundary: Does not include rate lookup services, historical data retrieval, or market analysis tools.
cat_fin_forex_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily calculates converted currency amounts between different currencies, classify here.

cat_fin_forex_sub4.name: Market Symbol Reference
cat_fin_forex_sub4.description: Services that provide lists of available currencies, currency pairs, or trading symbols. Acts as reference data for other services.
cat_fin_forex_sub4.boundary: Does not include rate data, conversion calculations, or market analysis.
cat_fin_forex_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides reference lists of currencies, pairs, or symbols, classify here.

cat_fin_forex_sub7.name: Portfolio Integration
cat_fin_forex_sub7.description: Services that integrate forex data into broader financial contexts like portfolio management or account currency holdings.
cat_fin_forex_sub7.boundary: Does not include standalone forex services without broader financial integration context.
cat_fin_forex_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily integrates forex data into broader financial portfolios or account contexts, classify here.

cat_fin_stocks_sub1.name: Real-Time Price & Quotes
cat_fin_stocks_sub1.description: Current stock prices, real-time quotes, and immediate trading data.
cat_fin_stocks_sub1.boundary: Focuses on live/current price data. Excludes historical data, financial statements, or analytical metrics.
cat_fin_stocks_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides current/live price data or real-time quotes, classify here.

cat_fin_stocks_sub10.name: Symbol & Security Identification
cat_fin_stocks_sub10.description: Symbol lookup, ticker details, security identification, and instrument reference data.
cat_fin_stocks_sub10.boundary: Focuses on security identification, reference data, and lookup functionality. Excludes price data, financial statements, or analytical metrics.
cat_fin_stocks_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides symbol/ticker lookup, identification data, or reference data, classify here.

cat_fin_stocks_sub12.name: Valuation & Investment Analysis
cat_fin_stocks_sub12.description: Valuation metrics, DCF models, intrinsic value, risk assessment, and portfolio analysis.
cat_fin_stocks_sub12.boundary: Focuses on valuation, investment decision support, and risk/portfolio analysis. Excludes raw price data, financial statements, or technical indicators.
cat_fin_stocks_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides valuation models, intrinsic value calculations, risk metrics, or portfolio analysis, classify here.

cat_fin_stocks_sub14.name: Comparative & Screening Tools
cat_fin_stocks_sub14.description: Peer comparisons, industry benchmarks, stock screening, and market-wide data queries.
cat_fin_stocks_sub14.boundary: Focuses on comparative analysis and screening across multiple securities. Excludes individual company data or financial statements.
cat_fin_stocks_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides comparative analysis against peers, benchmarks, or screening/filtering capabilities, classify here.

cat_fin_stocks_sub2.name: Historical Price Data
cat_fin_stocks_sub2.description: Historical stock prices, OHLC data, and time series price information.
cat_fin_stocks_sub2.boundary: Focuses on past price data over specified periods. Excludes real-time quotes, financial statements, or analytical metrics.
cat_fin_stocks_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides past price data over specified time periods, classify here.

cat_fin_stocks_sub3.name: Financial Statements
cat_fin_stocks_sub3.description: Balance sheets, income statements, cash flow statements, and related accounting data.
cat_fin_stocks_sub3.boundary: Focuses on formal financial accounting statements. Excludes derived metrics, price data, or company profiles.
cat_fin_stocks_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides formal financial accounting statements, classify here.

cat_fin_stocks_sub4.name: Company Fundamentals & Profiles
cat_fin_stocks_sub4.description: Company profiles, overviews, basic corporate information, news, and ownership data.
cat_fin_stocks_sub4.boundary: Focuses on descriptive company information, news, and ownership structures. Excludes financial statements, price data, or analytical metrics.
cat_fin_stocks_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides descriptive company information, news, or ownership data, classify here.

cat_fin_stocks_sub5.name: Analyst Estimates & Recommendations
cat_fin_stocks_sub5.description: Analyst opinions, earnings estimates, recommendations, and forward-looking projections.
cat_fin_stocks_sub5.boundary: Focuses on third-party analyst opinions and estimates. Excludes historical data, financial statements, or technical indicators.
cat_fin_stocks_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides analyst opinions, estimates, or recommendations, classify here.

cat_fin_stocks_sub6.name: Technical Indicators & Patterns
cat_fin_stocks_sub6.description: Technical analysis indicators, chart patterns, trading signals, and price-based metrics.
cat_fin_stocks_sub6.boundary: Focuses on price/volume-derived technical analysis tools. Excludes fundamental data, financial statements, or analyst recommendations.
cat_fin_stocks_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides technical analysis indicators or chart patterns, classify here.

cat_fin_stocks_sub7.name: Financial Ratios & Performance Metrics
cat_fin_stocks_sub7.description: Calculated financial ratios, performance metrics, and analytical calculations from statements.
cat_fin_stocks_sub7.boundary: Focuses on derived metrics from financial data. Excludes raw financial statements, price data, or company profiles.
cat_fin_stocks_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides calculated financial ratios or performance metrics, classify here.

cat_fin_stocks_sub8.name: Corporate Actions & Events
cat_fin_stocks_sub8.description: Dividends, splits, earnings announcements, mergers, and other corporate events or reports.
cat_fin_stocks_sub8.boundary: Focuses on scheduled or announced corporate events and related reports. Excludes price data, financial statements, or analytical metrics.
cat_fin_stocks_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides data on corporate actions, events, or related reports, classify here.

cat_fin_stocks_sub9.name: Market Data & Trading Activity
cat_fin_stocks_sub9.description: Trading volume, market activity, order book data, and trading execution operations.
cat_fin_stocks_sub9.boundary: Focuses on trading activity, market microstructure data, and execution. Excludes price quotes, financial statements, or company information.
cat_fin_stocks_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides trading activity, volume, market data, or enables trading operations, classify here.

cat_acc_01.name: Property Discovery & Information
cat_acc_01.description: Services that help users find and learn about lodging options via search, filters, details, and reviews.
cat_acc_01.boundary: Covers initial property search, listing, filtering, and retrieval of static property information (amenities, photos, descriptions, reviews). Does NOT involve real-time availability checks, pricing for specific dates, or booking transactions.
cat_acc_01.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for/lists properties based on criteria OR fetches detailed, non-transactional property information/reviews, classify here. It does not confirm real-time availability or pricing for specific dates.

cat_acc_02.name: Availability & Rate Checking
cat_acc_02.description: Services that verify real-time availability and retrieve current prices for specific properties and dates.
cat_acc_02.boundary: Focuses on real-time inventory and pricing queries for specific properties and dates. This is a pre-booking check. Does NOT execute the booking transaction itself.
cat_acc_02.decision_rule: If the service's primary function is to check real-time room/property availability and fetch rates for a specific property and date combination, classify here. It does not create or modify a reservation.

cat_acc_03.name: Booking Execution & Management
cat_acc_03.description: Services that create, modify, or cancel confirmed lodging reservations for a guest.
cat_acc_03.boundary: Handles the core booking transaction (reservation creation) and subsequent changes (modification, cancellation) to confirmed bookings. Requires a specific property and dates.
cat_acc_03.decision_rule: If the service's primary function is to create a new confirmed reservation OR modify/cancel an existing booking, classify here. It assumes availability and pricing have been determined.

cat_acc_07.name: Business Analytics & Metrics
cat_acc_07.description: Services that calculate performance metrics (occupancy, RevPAR) for lodging business operations.
cat_acc_07.boundary: For business/management insight and reporting. Does NOT support guest-facing functions like searching, booking, or checking availability.
cat_acc_07.decision_rule: If the service primarily calculates analytical metrics about property or business performance (e.g., occupancy, revenue), classify here.

cat_sub5_sub1_sub1.name: Title Core Metadata
cat_sub5_sub1_sub1.description: Services that retrieve fundamental identifying and descriptive information about a specific movie or TV show.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub1.boundary: Includes title, year, synopsis, cast/crew lists, posters, trailers, and episode/season data for TV shows. Does NOT include specialized facets like quotes, ratings, or availability data.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub1.decision_rule: If the service retrieves the basic, identifying details and primary descriptive assets for a single title (including TV episodes/seasons), classify here.

cat_sub5_sub1_sub11.name: Streaming & Availability Data
cat_sub5_sub1_sub11.description: Services that check where a title can be watched or obtained.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub11.boundary: Focuses on data about where and when a title is available (platform, theater, download source, showtimes). Does NOT include core title metadata or media assets.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves data about where and when a title is available to watch or obtain, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub1_sub14.name: Identifier Conversion & Lookup
cat_sub5_sub1_sub14.description: Services that translate between different identification systems for titles.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub14.boundary: Focuses on converting a title or identifier from one system to another identifier (e.g., title to ID, IMDb to TMDB). Does NOT include retrieving substantive metadata.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily converts a title or identifier from one system to another identifier, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub1_sub2.name: Title Extended Metadata
cat_sub5_sub1_sub2.description: Services that retrieve specialized, supplementary information about a specific title.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub2.boundary: Includes quotes, trivia, keywords, news, franchise data, parental guides, and critic/audience ratings & reviews. Does NOT include core metadata, aggregated lists, or availability data.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub2.decision_rule: If the service retrieves a specific, non-core data facet (e.g., quotes, trivia, ratings, reviews) for a single title, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub1_sub3.name: Title Search & Discovery
cat_sub5_sub1_sub3.description: Services that search, filter, or browse catalogs to find movies/TV shows.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub3.boundary: Focuses on querying a catalog with user-provided parameters (title, genre, keyword) to return a list of potential titles. Does NOT include retrieving detailed metadata for a known title.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches or filters a catalog to return a list of potential titles based on user query, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub1_sub4.name: Title Recommendations & Similarity
cat_sub5_sub1_sub4.description: Services that suggest movies or TV shows based on similarity or user taste.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub4.boundary: Focuses on generating suggested titles based on attributes of another title, user preferences, or collaborative filtering. Does NOT include general search/browse or aggregated popularity lists.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily generates a list of suggested titles based on the attributes of another title or user taste, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub1_sub5.name: Title Aggregated Lists
cat_sub5_sub1_sub5.description: Services that return curated lists of titles based on status or collective metrics.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub5.boundary: Focuses on pre-defined lists ranked or filtered by a collective metric (popularity, rating, release date like 'now playing', 'top rated'). Does NOT include searching by user query or personalized recommendations.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily returns a pre-defined list of titles ranked or filtered by a collective metric, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub1_sub6.name: People & Filmography
cat_sub5_sub1_sub6.description: Services that retrieve information about individuals and their associated works.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub6.boundary: Focuses on data about a person in the industry (actor, director) or the list of titles they are associated with. Does NOT include services focused solely on title metadata.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves data about a person in the industry or their filmography/credits, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub1_sub8.name: Genre & Classification Data
cat_sub5_sub1_sub8.description: Services that retrieve genre lists or determine genres for titles.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub8.boundary: Focuses on the master list of genres or identifying the genre(s) of a given title. Does NOT include searching titles by genre or other forms of metadata.
cat_sub5_sub1_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves the master list of genres or identifies the genre of a given title, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub14_sub1.name: Movie Recommendations
cat_sub5_sub14_sub1.description: Services that suggest movies based on taste, similarity, or regional cinema.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub1.boundary: Includes general movie suggestions and those focused on specific film industries (e.g., Bollywood). Excludes TV shows, anime series, and other media types.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily recommends or discovers movies, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub14_sub10.name: Single Media Playback
cat_sub5_sub14_sub10.description: Services that retrieve or play a specific piece of media for a user.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub10.boundary: Focuses on fetching or playing a single identified item. Excludes recommendation or discovery of multiple options.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves or plays a specific, identified media item, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub14_sub11.name: Tag-Based Discovery
cat_sub5_sub14_sub11.description: Services that find media based on tags, keywords, or metadata filters.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub11.boundary: Focuses on discovery via explicit tags or metadata. Excludes algorithmic taste-based recommendations.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily discovers media using tags or keyword filters, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub14_sub2.name: TV & Series Recommendations
cat_sub5_sub14_sub2.description: Services that suggest TV shows, series, episodic content, or anime.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub2.boundary: Includes scripted, unscripted, documentary series, and anime. Excludes movies and general video content.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily recommends or discovers TV shows, series, or anime, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub14_sub3.name: Music & Audio Recommendations
cat_sub5_sub14_sub3.description: Services that suggest songs, artists, albums, playlists, or podcasts.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub3.boundary: Focuses on musical and spoken-word audio content. Excludes audiobooks.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily recommends or discovers music or podcasts, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub14_sub4.name: Book & Reading Recommendations
cat_sub5_sub14_sub4.description: Services that suggest books, authors, audiobooks, or reading material.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub4.boundary: Includes fiction, non-fiction, genres, and audiobooks. Excludes articles and short-form text.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily recommends or discovers books or audiobooks, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub14_sub5.name: Video Content Recommendations
cat_sub5_sub14_sub5.description: Services that suggest general online videos from platforms like YouTube or TikTok.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub5.boundary: Focuses on short-form, user-generated, or platform-agnostic video. Excludes dedicated movies/TV shows.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily recommends or discovers general online videos, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub14_sub7.name: Playlist & Collection Curation
cat_sub5_sub14_sub7.description: Services that algorithmically build or suggest themed playlists or collections.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub7.boundary: Focuses on creating or curating grouped content. Excludes fetching static, existing playlists.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily builds or suggests new playlists/collections, classify here.

cat_sub5_sub14_sub9.name: Streaming & Availability Discovery
cat_sub5_sub14_sub9.description: Services that find where to watch media or check release dates.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub9.boundary: Focuses on availability, licensing, and platform data. Excludes content-based taste recommendations.
cat_sub5_sub14_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily discovers streaming availability or release info, classify here.

cat_music_1.name: Individual Tracks & Songs
cat_music_1.description: Services that operate on or retrieve information about specific, singular audio recordings or songs.
cat_music_1.boundary: Not for collections of tracks (playlists), artist discographies (albums), or aggregated chart data.
cat_music_1.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves, downloads, or provides metadata for a single, specific song/audio track, classify here.

cat_music_10.name: Playback Control
cat_music_10.description: Services that control the real-time playback of audio content, such as starting playback or checking current status.
cat_music_10.boundary: Not for downloading content, managing libraries, or searching for content.
cat_music_10.decision_rule: If the service primarily initiates, controls, or monitors the real-time playback of audio on a device, classify here.

cat_music_11.name: Music Video Content
cat_music_11.description: Services that retrieve information about or from music videos, such as view counts, milestones, and trending lists.
cat_music_11.boundary: Not for audio-only tracks, podcasts, or radio streams.
cat_music_11.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves data specifically about music videos (e.g., views, milestones), classify here.

cat_music_12.name: Lyrics & Song Meanings
cat_music_12.description: Services that provide or search for song lyrics, user interpretations, and associated textual content.
cat_music_12.boundary: Not for audio playback, artist biographies, or general music metadata without a lyrical focus.
cat_music_12.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for or retrieves song lyrics or user-contributed song meanings, classify here.

cat_music_2.name: Artists & Creators
cat_music_2.description: Services focused on the creators of audio content, providing biographical data, discographies, and related artist networks.
cat_music_2.boundary: Not for the audio content they create (tracks/albums) or user-generated collections (playlists).
cat_music_2.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves information about a musician, band, or podcast creator (biography, related artists, singles), classify here.

cat_music_3.name: Albums & Releases
cat_music_3.description: Services that handle formal collections of tracks released together as a packaged unit by an artist.
cat_music_3.boundary: Not for user-created playlists, individual tracks, or aggregated charts of multiple albums.
cat_music_3.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves information about or manages a specific album or EP release, classify here.

cat_music_4.name: Playlists & User Collections
cat_music_4.description: Services for creating, managing, and retrieving user-curated or platform-generated collections of tracks.
cat_music_4.boundary: Not for formal artist albums, individual tracks, or algorithmic radio streams.
cat_music_4.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates, modifies, or fetches details of a user-generated or featured list of songs (playlist), classify here.

cat_music_5.name: Charts & Rankings
cat_music_5.description: Services that provide aggregated, ranked lists of popular audio content (songs, albums, artists) based on metrics like sales or streams.
cat_music_5.boundary: Not for unranked search results, individual content metadata, or personalized recommendations.
cat_music_5.decision_rule: If the service primarily retrieves a ranked list (chart) of popular content for a specific region, genre, or time period, classify here.

cat_music_6.name: Radio & Live Streams
cat_music_6.description: Services for discovering, listing, and accessing live or continuous audio streams, including internet radio stations and channels.
cat_music_6.boundary: Not for on-demand playback of specific tracks/albums or static podcast episodes.
cat_music_6.decision_rule: If the service primarily lists, searches, or provides access to live or continuous broadcast audio streams, classify here.

cat_music_8.name: Search & Discovery
cat_music_8.description: Services that enable searching across multiple content types or provide personalized recommendations for audio content.
cat_music_8.boundary: Not for retrieving known, specific entities (like a known artist ID) without a search/discovery intent.
cat_music_8.decision_rule: If the service primarily performs a broad search across content types or generates personalized content suggestions, classify here.

cat_music_9.name: User Library Management
cat_music_9.description: Services that allow a user to save, organize, and retrieve their personal collection of audio content (tracks, albums, artists).
cat_music_9.boundary: Not for public playlists, chart data, or content discovery unrelated to a user's personal library.
cat_music_9.decision_rule: If the service primarily saves, removes, or lists audio content from a specific user's personal library, classify here.

cat_vid_content_1.name: Content Discovery & Feeds
cat_vid_content_1.description: Services that find videos through search, trending lists, or personalized recommendation feeds.
cat_vid_content_1.boundary: Focuses on discovering unknown content through queries, algorithms, or curated lists. Excludes retrieval of specific known content.
cat_vid_content_1.decision_rule: Classify here if the service helps users find new videos they didn't specifically request by URL/ID.

cat_vid_content_11.name: Specific Content Retrieval
cat_vid_content_11.description: Services that fetch videos, channels, or playlists using specific known identifiers like URLs, IDs, or usernames.
cat_vid_content_11.boundary: Focuses on retrieving content the user already knows and can directly reference. Includes videos, channels, and playlists.
cat_vid_content_11.decision_rule: Classify here if the service requires a specific video ID, channel ID, playlist ID, or exact URL to function.

cat_vid_content_12.name: Trending & Popular Content Lists
cat_vid_content_12.description: Services that provide curated lists of popular, trending, or chart-topping videos.
cat_vid_content_12.boundary: Focuses on pre-defined rankings and lists based on popularity metrics. Excludes personalized discovery or search.
cat_vid_content_12.decision_rule: Classify here if the service returns a fixed list (e.g., 'top 10', 'trending') without personalized queries or recommendations.

cat_vid_content_3.name: Video Metadata Retrieval
cat_vid_content_3.description: Services that fetch descriptive and technical information about specific videos.
cat_vid_content_3.boundary: Focuses on static data about a video (title, description, duration, format). Excludes dynamic engagement data or content analysis.
cat_vid_content_3.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary output is descriptive/technical data for a known video, without analysis or engagement metrics.

cat_vid_content_5.name: Content Analysis & Intelligence
cat_vid_content_5.description: Services that interpret, summarize, classify, or generate insights from video content or metadata.
cat_vid_content_5.boundary: Focuses on deriving meaning, summaries, topics, or optimized metadata from video. Includes both analysis and generation support.
cat_vid_content_5.decision_rule: Classify here if the service interprets video substance, summarizes content, classifies topics, or generates publishing metadata.

cat_vid_content_6.name: Engagement & Performance Analytics
cat_vid_content_6.description: Services that retrieve user interaction metrics, statistics, and community data about videos.
cat_vid_content_6.boundary: Focuses on dynamic, quantitative data about video performance and audience interaction. Excludes static metadata.
cat_vid_content_6.decision_rule: Classify here if the service fetches metrics like view counts, comments, likes, or session analytics for videos.

cat_sub5_sub8_sub1.name: Music Charts
cat_sub5_sub8_sub1.description: Ranked lists of songs, albums, or artists based on sales, streams, or audio popularity.
cat_sub5_sub8_sub1.boundary: Focuses exclusively on audio music recordings. Excludes video content, social metrics as primary driver, or geographic/niche specificity as defining feature.
cat_sub5_sub8_sub1.decision_rule: Classify here ONLY if the service ranks music based primarily on audio consumption metrics (sales, streams, radio). NOT if ranking is primarily by video views, social engagement, geographic region, genre niche, or historical period.

cat_sub5_sub8_sub2.name: Video Charts
cat_sub5_sub8_sub2.description: Ranked lists of video content based on views, engagement, or popularity.
cat_sub5_sub8_sub2.boundary: Focuses on video content including music videos, general videos, movies, and TV shows. Excludes audio-only charts.
cat_sub5_sub8_sub2.decision_rule: Classify here if the service ranks video content. Includes film/TV rankings and video platform charts. NOT for audio-only music charts.

cat_sub5_sub8_sub5.name: Regional Charts
cat_sub5_sub8_sub5.description: Ranked lists where geographic location is the primary defining filter.
cat_sub5_sub8_sub5.boundary: Focuses on rankings explicitly filtered by country, city, or region. Geographic specificity is the core differentiator.
cat_sub5_sub8_sub5.decision_rule: Classify here ONLY if the service's primary purpose is to rank content for a specific geographic area. NOT if location is just one optional filter among many.

cat_sub5_sub8_sub7.name: Historical & Legacy Charts
cat_sub5_sub8_sub7.description: Ranked lists capturing all-time, historical, or milestone achievements.
cat_sub5_sub8_sub7.boundary: Focuses on historical timeframes, all-time rankings, or milestone celebrations. Excludes current/recent period charts.
cat_sub5_sub8_sub7.decision_rule: Classify here ONLY if the chart measures historical performance (e.g., 'all-time', 'greatest of all time', 'anniversary'). NOT for current weekly/monthly charts.

cat_sub7_sub3_sub1.name: Dining & Restaurant Search
cat_sub7_sub3_sub1.description: Services that find restaurants, cafes, or dining establishments by location, cuisine, ratings, or specific attributes.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub1.boundary: Does not include general retail stores, entertainment venues, or accommodation services. For food retail/grocery, see Retail & Shopping.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for restaurants, cafes, or dining establishments, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub3_sub13.name: General Venue Search
cat_sub7_sub3_sub13.description: Services that search for multiple types of venues or businesses without specialization.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub13.boundary: Does not include specialized searches for specific venue types. For specialized searches, use the appropriate specific category.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub13.decision_rule: If the service searches for multiple venue types without specializing in one category, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub3_sub2.name: Retail & Shopping
cat_sub7_sub3_sub2.description: Services that locate retail stores, shopping centers, or specific products available at stores.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub2.boundary: Does not include restaurants, entertainment venues, or service facilities. For electronics/pharmacy specialty retail, see Specialty Retail.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for general retail stores or shopping locations, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub3_sub3.name: Specialty Retail
cat_sub7_sub3_sub3.description: Services that find specialized retail stores like electronics, pharmacies, bookstores, or clothing stores.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub3.boundary: Does not include general retail, restaurants, or entertainment venues. For general shopping, see Retail & Shopping.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for specialized retail stores (electronics, pharmacy, books, clothing), classify here.

cat_sub7_sub3_sub4.name: Transportation Hubs
cat_sub7_sub3_sub4.description: Services that locate airports, train stations, metro stations, bus stations, or other transportation facilities.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub4.boundary: Does not include EV charging stations, general businesses, or attractions. For EV charging, see Vehicle Services.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for airports, train stations, or public transport hubs, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub3_sub5.name: Vehicle Services
cat_sub7_sub3_sub5.description: Services that find EV charging stations, parking facilities, or other vehicle-related service locations.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub5.boundary: Does not include transportation hubs, general businesses, or retail stores. For airports/stations, see Transportation Hubs.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for EV charging stations or vehicle service facilities, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub3_sub6.name: Entertainment & Leisure
cat_sub7_sub3_sub6.description: Services that locate movie theaters, attractions, parks, or entertainment venues.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub6.boundary: Does not include restaurants, retail stores, or accommodation. For outdoor activities, see Outdoor & Recreation.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for movie theaters, attractions, or entertainment venues, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub3_sub7.name: Outdoor & Recreation
cat_sub7_sub3_sub7.description: Services that find parks, scenic spots, outdoor activities, or recreational facilities.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub7.boundary: Does not include entertainment venues, restaurants, or retail. For indoor entertainment, see Entertainment & Leisure.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for parks, scenic spots, or outdoor recreational locations, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub3_sub9.name: Education & Institutions
cat_sub7_sub3_sub9.description: Services that find schools, colleges, libraries, or educational institutions.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub9.boundary: Does not include government facilities, healthcare, or general businesses. For other public facilities, see Public Services.
cat_sub7_sub3_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for schools, libraries, or educational institutions, classify here.
